title: Trieu Da's Invasion
summary: A painful story of how a lack of vigilance led to the loss of the Au Lac kingdom, marking the beginning of the long Northern domination period.

slides.text: Trieu Da - the king of Nam Viet in the North - repeatedly led his troops to attack Au Lac, but he consistently failed because of the magical crossbow.
slides.imagePrompt: Invading army failing at Co Loa walls, arrows in the air, Triệu Đà looking frustrated, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Trieu Da then used a scheme to fane peace, sending his son Trong Thuy to marry An Duong Vuong's daughter and find a way to switch the magical crossbow.
slides.imagePrompt: Trong Thuy and My Nuong together, romantic but secret, Trong Thuy looking at the crossbow, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Trusting his son-in-law too much, An Duong Vuong allowed Trong Thuy to see the magical crossbow. Trong Thuy secretly swapped the real trigger with a fake one.
slides.imagePrompt: Trong Thuy swapping the glowing claw for a plain one, dark background, suspense, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: Once he held the secret, Trieu Da immediately sent his troops to attack. Overconfident, An Duong Vuong brought out the crossbow to fire, but its magic was gone.
slides.imagePrompt: An Dương Vương holding the crossbow, shocked as it fails to fire magical arrows, enemy army approaching, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.text: The citadel was lost, the nation fell. An Duong Vuong and My Nuong fled toward the sea. Au Lac fell into enemy hands, beginning a tragic era.
slides.imagePrompt: King and Princess on a horse galloping towards the sea, palace burning in distance, sad scene, children book illustration, cartoon style, bright colors

slides.question: What scheme did Trieu Da use to defeat An Duong Vuong?
options: A marriage alliance (sending Trong Thuy as son-in-law)
slides.answer: A marriage alliance (sending Trong Thuy as son-in-law)

slides.question: What did Trong Thuy steal from Au Lac?
options: The trigger of the Magic Crossbow
slides.answer: The trigger of the Magic Crossbow

slides.question: Why did An Duong Vuong lose the battle?
options: Because of overconfidence and too much trust in others
Because the citadel walls were not high enough
slides.answer: Because of overconfidence and too much trust in others
